title: OAuth2 callback insufficient parameters for SharePoint
symptom: When attempting to connect to SharePoint, n8n returns 'Insufficient parameters for OAuth2 callback'. This indicates a permissions issue with the OAuth2 setup.
not_this_if: Error occurs with a different node or authentication method
root_cause: The error occurs because the n8n application does not have the necessary permissions granted for both the SharePoint API and the Microsoft Graph API in the Azure app registration. Without these permissions, the OAuth2 callback cannot complete successfully.
fix_steps: Open the n8n credentials settings for Microsoft SharePoint.
Ensure that permissions for both SharePoint API and Microsoft Graph API are granted in the Azure app registration.
Save the changes and attempt to reconnect to SharePoint.
agent_instruction: Grant permissions for both SharePoint API and Microsoft Graph API in the Azure app registration.
